en: OF SOLOMON.Give the king your justice, O God, and your righteousness to the royal son!
zh: 神啊！求你把你的公正賜給王， 把你的公義賜給王子。

en: May he judge your people with righteousness, and your poor with justice!
zh: 他要按著公義審判你的子民， 憑著公正審判你的困苦人。

en: Let the mountains bear prosperity for the people, and the hills, in righteousness!
zh: 因著公義， 願大山和小山都給人民帶來和平。

en: May he defend the cause of the poor of the people, give deliverance to the children of the needy, and crush the oppressor!
zh: 他必為民間的困苦人伸冤， 拯救貧窮人， 粉碎那欺壓人的。

en: May they fear you while the sun endures, and as long as the moon, throughout all generations!
zh: 他必像日月一般長久， 直到萬代 。

en: May he be like rain that falls on the mown grass, like showers that water the earth!
zh: 他必像雨降在已割的草地上， 像甘霖滋潤大地。

en: In his days may the righteous flourish, and peace abound, till the moon be no more!
zh: 他在世的日子，義人必興旺， 四境太平，直到月亮不再重現。

en: May he have dominion from sea to sea, and from the River to the ends of the earth!
zh: 他要執掌權柄，從這海到那海， 從大河直到地極。

en: May desert tribes bow down before him and his enemies lick the dust!
zh: 住在曠野的人必向他屈身， 他的仇敵必舔塵土。

en: May the kings of Tarshish and of the coastlands render him tribute; may the kings of Sheba and Seba bring gifts!
zh: 他施和海島的列王都必帶來禮物， 示巴和西巴的列王都必獻上貢物。

en: May all kings fall down before him, all nations serve him!
zh: 眾王都必向他俯伏， 萬國都必服事他。

en: For he delivers the needy when he calls, the poor and him who has no helper.
zh: 因為貧窮人呼求的時候，他就搭救； 沒有人幫助的困苦人，他也搭救。

en: He has pity on the weak and the needy, and saves the lives of the needy.
zh: 他必憐恤軟弱和貧窮的人， 拯救貧窮人的性命。

en: From oppression and violence he redeems their life, and precious is their blood in his sight.
zh: 他要救他們脫離欺凌和強暴， 他們的血在他眼中看為寶貴。

en: Long may he live; may gold of Sheba be given to him! May prayer be made for him continually, and blessings invoked for him all the day!
zh: 願他長久活著， 願人把示巴的金子奉給他， 願人為他不住禱告， 終日給他祝福。

en: May there be abundance of grain in the land; on the tops of the mountains may it wave; may its fruit be like Lebanon; and may people blossom in the cities like the grass of the field!
zh: 願地上五穀豐登， 山頂上也都豐收； 願地上的果實茂盛，像黎巴嫩山的樹林， 願城裡的人繁衍，好像地上的青草。

en: May his name endure forever, his fame continue as long as the sun! May people be blessed in him, all nations call him blessed!
zh: 願他的名永遠常存， 願他的名延續像太陽的恆久； 願萬人都因他蒙福， 願萬國都稱他為有福的。

en: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, who alone does wondrous things.
zh: 獨行奇事的以色列的 神， 就是耶和華 神，是應當稱頌的。

en: Blessed be his glorious name forever; may the whole earth be filled with his glory! Amen and Amen!
zh: 他榮耀的名也是應當永遠稱頌的； 願他的榮耀充滿全地。 阿們，阿們。

en: The prayers of David, the son of Jesse, are ended.
zh: 耶西的兒子大衛的禱告完畢。
